name: mini-jira-worker-v2
description: SQS assignment worker for Mini-Jira task assignment activity logs and metrics.

scripts.zip: powershell -NoProfile -Command "if (Test-Path mini-jira-worker-v2.zip) { Remove-Item mini-jira-worker-v2.zip -Force }; Compress-Archive -Path index.js,package.json,package-lock.json,node_modules -DestinationPath mini-jira-worker-v2.zip -Force"
